hero.title: Plan Your Next Trip with Waynest
hero.description: We’re in early access. Be the first to build itineraries as we launch, discover destinations, and shape the community.

smartPlanning.title: Smart Planning
smartPlanning.description: Build itineraries with clear steps and a calm, guided flow from day one.

discoverPlaces.title: Discover Places
discoverPlaces.description: Curate stays and experiences as we grow the platform together.

communityReviews.title: Community Reviews
communityReviews.description: Reviews open after launch. You will be among the first voices.

saveShare.title: Save & Share
saveShare.description: Keep your trips organized and share them with friends in seconds.

hero.badge: AI travel system with real catalog data
hero.title: The travel planner that feels smart, clear, and instantly useful.
hero.description: Waynest turns destination, budget, travelers, interests, places, opening hours, and public events into an editable route that makes sense from the first screen.

micro.fastFlow: Fast guest flow with no setup wall
micro.explained: AI route logic explained, not hidden
micro.planning: Designed for planning, sharing, and remixing

visual.analysisItem2: Group size, budget, and selected currency
visual.analysisItem3: Interest tags, places, pricing, and opening hours
visual.analysisItem4: Matching events and share-ready route structure
visual.afternoonTitle: Budget-aware activity with real opening hours
visual.eveningTitle: Event match or local dining recommendation

standout.title: Built to feel different from generic travel tools
standout.description: The value is clear at a glance: AI planning, live destination data, and a social layer that makes routes reusable.

realInputs.title: AI that plans with real inputs
realInputs.description: Waynest builds routes from your destination, group size, budget, interests, place pricing, and opening hours.

firstClick.title: Usable from the first click
firstClick.description: Guests can explore, generate a trip, and understand the flow immediately without complex setup.

socialTravel.title: Travel as a social experience
socialTravel.description: Turn private planning into shareable routes that other travelers can view, copy, and remix.

planner.title: Simple enough for anyone to use

setDestination.title: Set the destination
setDestination.description: Pick the country, city, trip length, and traveler count.

giveContext.title: Give the AI context
giveContext.description: Add budget, currency, and interests so the route fits your style.

reviewRoute.title: Review a real route
reviewRoute.description: Get a day-by-day itinerary backed by places, costs, hours, and events.

featured.title: Real destinations users can explore right now
featured.empty: No featured places are available yet.
featured.fallbackDescription: Explore a destination that can be pulled directly into your next AI route.

events.title: Moments the planner can fold into a route

shared.title: Proof that Waynest routes can live beyond one user
shared.empty: No public routes are available yet.

cta.title: Start with the AI planner, then grow into the full Waynest experience.
cta.description: Generate a route as a guest, sign in to save it, and keep building on a system that combines usability, discovery, and social travel.

hero.title: Get in Touch
hero.subtitle: Have a question or feedback? We'd love to hear from you!

hero.title: About Waynest
hero.subtitle: Your trusted companion for discovering amazing destinations around the world

mission.title: Our Mission
mission.description: At Waynest, we believe that travel should be accessible, inspiring, and unforgettable. Our mission is to connect travelers with the world's most beautiful destinations, helping them discover hidden gems and create lasting memories.

discoverPlaces.title: Discover Places
discoverPlaces.description: Explore thousands of destinations, from bustling cities to serene natural wonders. Find the perfect place for your next adventure.

expertReviews.title: Expert Reviews
expertReviews.description: Read authentic reviews from fellow travelers and get insider tips about the best places to visit, eat, and stay.

planYourTrip.title: Plan Your Trip
planYourTrip.description: Save your favorite destinations, create wishlists, and plan your perfect itinerary all in one place.

communityDriven.title: Community Driven
communityDriven.description: Join a community of passionate travelers sharing their experiences and recommendations to help others explore the world.

whyChoose.title: Why Choose Waynest?
whyChoose.comprehensiveDatabaseDesc: Access information about countries, cities, and places from around the globe.
whyChoose.realExperiencesDesc: Get insights from real travelers who have been there and done that.
whyChoose.easyPlanningDesc: Organize your travel plans with our intuitive tools and features.
whyChoose.alwaysUpdatedDesc: Our platform is constantly updated with new destinations and fresh content.

ourStory.title: Our Story
ourStory.paragraph1: Waynest was born from a simple idea: making travel planning easier and more enjoyable. We understand that planning a trip can be overwhelming, with so many options and decisions to make. That's why we've created a platform that brings together everything you need in one place.
ourStory.paragraph2: Whether you're a seasoned traveler or planning your first adventure, Waynest is here to help you discover, plan, and experience the world in a whole new way.

joinCommunity.title: Join Our Community
joinCommunity.description: Ready to start your next adventure? Join thousands of travelers who trust Waynest to help them discover amazing destinations and create unforgettable memories.

hero.title: Discover Destinations
hero.subtitle: Explore amazing countries and cities around the world
